headline: Citi Raises its Price Target on Devon Energy (DVN)
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On May 20, 2026, Citi raised the firm’s price target on Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) to $65 from $60 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. Citi said that despite the recent rally in the exploration and production sector, […]
